PLAINTIFF STEVE GIN'S MOTION TO REMOVE CASE FROM JUDICIAL ARBITRATION IS SCHEDULED THIS DAY. THERE BEING NO APPEARANCE NOR AN OBJECTION TENTATIVE RULING TO GRANT MOTION IS ADOPTED. MOTION IS ORDERED GRANTED. CASE IS ORDERED REMOVED FROM JUDICIAL ARBITRATION. MOVING PARTY TO SUBMIT A PROPOSED ORDER WITHIN FIVE DAYS. COURT ORDERED A MEDIATION ENFORCEMENT ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SCHEDULED ON 10/14/2009 AT 10:00 AM, IN DEPARTMENT 212. COURT ORDERED A JURY TRIAL DATE OF 2/22/2010 AT 9:30 AM, IN DEPARTMENT 206. Off Calendar Aug-13-2009 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Plaintiff Steve Gin's Motion to Remove Case from Judicial Arbitration is scheduled this day. There being no appearance nor an objection tentative ruling to grant motion is adopted. Motion is ordered granted. Case is ordered removed from Judicial Arbitration. Moving party to submit a proposed order within five days. Court ordered a Mediation Enforcement Order to Show Cause scheduled on 10/14/2009 at 10:00 AM, in Department 212. Court ordered a Jury Trial Date of 2/22/2010 at 9:30 AM, in Department 206. Court to give notice of the Trial Date and Mandatory Settlement Conference. Proceedings reported by: Helen Tamara Williat-Harrison, CSR#4609. (212)
